content.section: Twin Flank is a tier 3 tank that can be selected upon reaching level 30 using "Twin" or "Flank Guard", and at level 45, can be upgraded into "Triple Twin" or "Battleship".

- Pressure all tanks that you're attacking, attack lower DPS tanks from close aand high DPS tanks from afar.
- Twin Flank doesn't have recoil while attacking, use this to rush players while being slowed.
- Twin Flank cant retreat well due to this lack of recoil, so using both sides to your advantage is important.
- Position yourself well to make use of your barrels, but don't put yourself in bad positions to be trapped.

- Twin Flank alongside Quad Tank are the only two tanks to upgrade from two different tier 2 tanks.
- In one of the oldest versions, Twin Flank used to upgrade into Octo Tank at level 45.
- Twin Flank and Trapper are the only Tier 3 tanks outside of Overseer that upgrades into a controllable drone tank.
- Twin Flank and Quad Tank are the only Tier 3 tanks that do not gain recoil from their bullets.
